In addition, its maintenance takes only a few seconds and the package also includes a high-quality hard case. With the Wacaco Nanopresso coffee machine, you can enjoy fresh coffee anywhere. Napájení probíhá pomocí USB nebo přes 5V USB nabíječku (není součástí balení).
